title: Co-RedTeam: Orchestrated Security Discovery and Exploitation with LLM Agents
referenceKeys: if direct references are necessary alway
perform all checks on the server

references.key: perform all checks on the server
references.raw: **Enforce Access Controls Server-Side:** Never rely on client-side controls (hidden fields, disabled buttons) for security. Perform all checks on the server.
references.title: Perform all checks on the server

references.key: if direct references are necessary alway
references.raw: **Use User/Session Indirect References:** Instead of exposing direct database IDs (like user id=123), use indirect references that map to the user’s session (e.g., /profile/me). If direct references are necessary, *alway
references.title: If direct references are necessary, *alway
